pkgmetadata.longdescription: Aspen is a filesystem router for Python web frameworks. See aspen.io_ forframework wrappers... _aspen.io httpaspen.ioInstallation, Testing, and Licenseaspen is available on GitHub_ and on PyPI_ pip install aspenWe test against 64-bit Python 2.7 and Python 3.6 on Linux travisAnd we test against 32- and 64-bit Python 2.7 on Windows appveyoraspen is MIT-licensed... _GitHub httpsgithub.comAspenWebaspen.py.. _PyPI httpspypi.python.orgpypiaspen.. travis image httpsimg.shields.iotravisAspenWebaspen.pymaster.svg target httpstravis-ci.orgAspenWebaspen.py alt Linux build status.. appveyor image httpsimg.shields.ioappveyorciAspenWebaspen-pymaster.svg target httpsci.appveyor.comprojectAspenWebaspen-py alt Windows build status
